---
title: "Contact Me"
---

I am always open to discussing new projects and ideas. Feel free to reach out to me via email or connect with me on my professional platforms!

<br>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3">
  <a href= "mailto:aidanmistry17@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email Me
    </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/aidan-mistry-56832b2a0/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
    </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/AMistry176" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-dark">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
  </a>

</div>
